title: vault put() with ?field= deviates from CLAUDE.md field-selector guard convention
description: CLAUDE.md states: 'Any backend that stores a field from ?field= must check it at the start of put() and return SecretError::InvalidUri if it is set.' The vault backend deliberately deviates: put() with ?field= writes a new KV v2 version containing only that field, which drops all other fields (documented as a footgun in the module docs). Consequence: a contributor reading CLAUDE.md will file a PR to 'fix' vault put() by adding the field guard, not realizing the behavior is intentional. Fix: add an explicit exception in CLAUDE.md ('except vault, which...') or record a bd decision explaining the deviation.
